basic_details.job_title: HPRCA Coach Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA), Hamirpur
basic_details.post_name: Coach (Volley Ball / Foot Ball / Basket Ball / Kabaddi / Badminton / Boxing / Hockey) in Sports Hostels
basic_details.total_vacancies: 14 Posts (Gen(UR) category only as per requisition)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Coach posts in specified Sports Hostels! Published at hprca.hp.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers multiple openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18-45 years age group (with relaxations) and possessing Bachelor’s degree + one year diploma in coaching (or PG Diploma in Sports Coaching) with participation at University/State/National/International level can apply online from 27-04-2026 to 19-05-2026. Find all details about the HPRCA Coach new vacancy 2026, including eligibility,

important_dates.correction_date: Four days after closing date of ORA

application_fee.details: Examination Fee: ₹100/- Processing Fee: ₹700/- Total Fee: ₹800/- (for all categories) Correction Fee: ₹100/- (during correction window)

age_limit.details: The age limit to apply for HPRCA Coach Recruitment 2026 is 18 to 45 years. The cutoff date for determining the age limit is 01 01 2025. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved category candidates as per government rules. 18-45 Years (as on 01-01-2026)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree, diploma, Post Graduate Diploma
qualification.details: Nationality: Indian Citizen and must fulfil the eligibility conditions as prescribed. | Coach

salary_details.fixed honorarium: ₹25,000/- per month (payable for 10 months in an academic year)
salary_details.additional benefits: As per CBSE Schools “Sub Scheme for the Engagements as Professional/English and Mathematics Teacher with Fixed Honorarium/Consolidated Amount” notified by Govt. of Himachal Pradesh
salary_details.tenure: Temporary for a period of 05 years (Scheme-based, no right of regularization)
salary_details.details: Fixed honorarium on contract basis as per scheme.

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) / Written Screening Test of 120 marks (1.5 hours duration). Document Verification. Final selection on the basis of merit in CBT/Written Test.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through https://hprca.hp.gov.in.
Register on One Time Registration (OTR) portal before filling ORA.
Fill complete and correct particulars in the Online Recruitment Application (ORA).
Pay the prescribed fee through online payment gateway.
Download and print the submitted application for future reference.
Last date for submission of online application is 19 May 2026 (11:59 PM).
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement carefully before filling the online application. Candidates must be registered on One Time Registration (OTR) portal before filling ORA. Only female candidates? No – both genders eligible as per post. Correction window of four days will be opened after closing date on payment of fee. Keep registered mobile number and email ID active till completion of selection process. No offline application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in HPRCA Coach Recruitment 2026 and for which sports?
faq.answer: Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog has announced 14 Coach posts for specified Sports Hostels under the School Education Department, including Volleyball (4), Football (1), Basketball (2), Kabaddi (2), Badminton (1), Boxing (1) and Hockey (3), all in General (UR) category as per requisition.

faq.question: Q2. What are the online application dates for HPRCA Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application (ORA) will be available from 27 April 2026 at 10:00 AM and the last date to apply online is 19 May 2026 up to 11:59 PM, after which a correction window of four days will open on payment of the prescribed correction fee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for HPRCA Coach posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University along with one‑year Diploma in Coaching in the concerned sport from a National Institute of Sports or a Post Graduate Diploma in Sports Coaching in the concerned game from a recognised State Sports University, and must have participated at University/State/National/International level in that sport.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for HPRCA Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 45 years, with the cut‑off date for age calculation as 01 January 2026, and relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PwD (HP domiciles), Ex‑servicemen of Himachal Pradesh and eligible HP Government employees, as per state government rules.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any Himachal Pradesh schooling or domicile condition for Coach posts?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must have passed Matriculation and 10+2 from any School/Institution located within Himachal Pradesh, except those who are Bonafide Himachalis, who are exempt from this in‑state schooling condition.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for HPRCA Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All categories are required to pay a total of ₹800, comprising ₹100 as Examination Fee and ₹700 as Processing Fee, while using the online payment gateway provided in the ORA; during the correction window, an additional ₹100 correction fee is charged per candidate.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process and exam pattern for HPRCA Coach posts?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a Computer Based Test (CBT) / Written Screening Test of 120 marks with 1.5 hours duration, followed by document verification, and the final merit list is prepared solely on the basis of marks obtained in the CBT/Written Test, subject to eligibility and document scrutiny.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary / honorarium and tenure for HPRCA Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected Coaches will be engaged on a scheme‑based contract with a fixed honorarium of ₹25,000 per month, payable for 10 months in an academic year, along with other admissible benefits as per the CBSE Schools “Sub Scheme for the Engagements as Professional/English and Mathematics Teacher with Fixed Honorarium/Consolidated Amount” notified by the Himachal Pradesh Government, for a temporary tenure of 5 years without any right to regularisation.
